title: Mid-market balanced
description: Typical mid-market deal: buyer balanced intent, moderate budget, healthy seller margin space. Both agents cooperative. Demonstrates the smooth-path workflow end-to-end including Dynamic Discount and ACTUS PAM simulation.

expectedOutcome.likely: Closes ₹380–₹410/unit in 2 rounds. Triggers full downstream workflow: PO → Invoice → DD auto-accept → ACTUS PAM SUCCESS.
expectedOutcome.possible: May take 3 rounds if buyer anchors aggressively low; final price likely still in band.
expectedOutcome.failureMode: If Gemini rate-limits, rule-based fallback may produce a more mechanical-looking round trail. Audit honestly labels usedFallback=true.

declaredButDeferred: sellerIntent (entirely — seller acts on its own .env config)
